DeSantis akagovana mepu iyi naFox News musi wa27 Kubvumbi asati aitumira kuhurumende. Akati mepu itsva  iyo inowanzoitwa makore gumi ega ega mushure mekunyorwa kwevanhu  yaizomiririra vagari vemuFlorida zvirinani. "Florida yakashanduka zvishoma mu2020 census, uye tanga tichirwira kuverengerwa kwakanaka kubvira ipapo", akadaro DeSantis Fox News, achitaura nezvekushomeka kwevanhu kwevanhu muhurumende gore iroro. "Vanhu vedu vakura zvakanyanya, uye takabva kuDemocratic majority kusvika pamamiriyoni 1.5".

claim: Nguva pfupi yadarika pakaitika kusanaya kwemvura muSpain, pakaonekwa chivakwa che megalithic chine makore 7 000, chakare kupfuura mapiramidhi eIjipiti.
evidence: Pamusoro pechikamu ichi Ichokwadi kuti chiyeuchidzo che megalithic chine makore zviuru zvinomwe chekare chinoratidzika kana nzara dzikaita kuti mvura yeValdecañas mudziva muSpain's autonomous community of Extremadura.Mumakore achangopfuura, chiyeuchidzo ichi chakaonekwa zvizere muna 2019 uye 2022 ... ... zvisinei, chiyeuchidzo ichi chakanga chakazara muna 2025  apo zvinyorwa nezvechiyeuchidzo ichi zvakagovaniswa zvakare  uye chiyeuchidzo chacho chakanga chisina kubuda. Chiyeuchidzo che megalithic chakarebesa kupfuura mapiramidhi eEgypt neStonehenge muEngland chakabva chatanga kubuda mumvura muSpain sezvo kusanaya kwakapararira munyika, maererano nerunyerekupe rwakapararira muna Chikunguru 2025. Semuenzaniso, musi wa14 Chikunguru 2025, post paFacebook yakaisa mufananidzo wechiyeuchidzo ichi pamwe nekutsanangurwa kwenguva refu (yakachengetwa): Mufananidzo uyu wakaratidza mudenga kuona kwechikomo chakakomberedza padyo nemvura yemvura.

claim: Mhou yakaomeswa inogona kurapa maronda emuromo
evidence: Asi kunyange zvazvo maronda emuromo akawanda achizorapa ega, mishonga yemuno inowanzorayirwa kuti iite kuti zviratidzo zvinyorwe. Zvirwere zvakakura, zvinoramba zvichiramba zvichiitika uye zvinodzokororwa zvinoda kurapwa kwakanyanya nechinangwa chekubvisa zviratidzo, kuderedza nguva yekugara kwemaronda, uye kuwedzera hutano hwemurwere. Saka, maronda emuromo akaomeswa haafaniri kuonekwa senzira yakavimbika yekurapa maronda emuromo. Quick Take An Instagram post inoratidza kuti kudya maronda emuromo akaomeswa kunogona kubatsira kurapa maronda. Mushure mekuongorora chirevo, takaona kuti ichocho hachisi chokwadi. The Claim Zvinoenderana ne Instagram reel, kudya maronda emuromo akaomeswa kazhinji kunoratidza kuti maronda emuromo anogona kuonekwa.

claim: Nigeria paakawana rusununguko, yaiva nevanhu vanenge mamiriyoni manomwe.
evidence: Zvinokosha kuti hurumende dzenharaunda dzaidzora mari yehurumende kubva pamari inowanikwa mudunhu rimwe nerimwe.Muna 1960, Nigeria yakawana rusununguko rwezvematongerwo enyika senyika ine simba pasi peMutemo we1960 uyo wakapa hurumende yeparamende, nzvimbo nhatu (Northern, Eastern uye Western Regions), hurongwa hwepamutemo hwepacameral pamubatanidzwa (Seneti neDare reVamiriri) uye pamatanho enharaunda (Dare reVamiriri neDare reVatungamiriri) nemasimba ehurumende ane simba repamutemo akasarudzwa mumapoka matatu kana mazita  exclusive, concurrent uye residual.Dr. Nnamdi Azikiwe vakaiswa saGavhuna-General wefederation uye Tafawa Balewa akaramba achishanda semutungamiri wehurumende yeparamende yakasarudzwa nenzira yeruzhinji, asi yava nyika yakazvimiririra.Kubva muna 1960, Nigeria yakava nyika yakazvimiririra zvachose uye ine vatungamiri veNyika yeNigeria.

claim: Walgreens yakatanga kutengesa makadhi eHallmark Mahogany, mucherechedzo wemakadhi ekupa makadhi chete kune vatema muna kana kutenderera Nyamavhuvhu 2025.
evidence: Nezve kuongororwa uku, Walgreens yakaisa zvigadzirwa kubva kuHallmark Mahogany brand pawebhusaiti yayo, ine sarudzo dzekutora zvigadzirwa muchitoro, panguva yekunyora uku.Hallmark yakati pawebhusaiti yayo kuti iyo Mahogany brand yaive "iyo yakakura kwazvo kupa makadhi anowanikwa kune vatengi veAfrica vekuAmerica".Kunyangwe Hallmark yakagadzirisa makadhi ayo eMahogany brand kune vatengi veAfrica vekuAmerica, hatina kuwana humbowo hwekuti kambani yakadzivirira vamwe vatengi kuti vavatenge.Zvaive zvisingazivikanwe panguva yekunyora iyi kuti Walgreens yakatanga riini kutakura makadhi eHallmark Mahogany.Zvakaitwa online muna Nyamavhuvhu 2025 zvati Walgreens "zvakatanga" kutengesa makadhi.Hallmark yakatanga kutengesa makadhi muna 1991, sekureva kwewebsite yayo.Muna Nyamavhuvhu 2025, chirevo (chakaratidzwa) chakapararira online chekuti mutengesi Walgreens akatanga mutsara wekutenga makadhi ekukwazisa chete kune vanhu veBlack Hallmark Mahogany.

claim: Nzvimbo dzokugara dzinodhura nokuti takanyudza nyika nevatorwa vasingabvumirwi nemutemo vanosvika mamiriyoni 30 uye nekuda kwekushomeka kwemisha.

claim: Bhora rokutanga rechando rakagadzirwa netsaona apo mumwe munhu aiedza kuvaka chiedza chakajeka.
evidence: Pamusoro pechikamu ichi Erwin Perzy I, mugadziri wezvigadzirwa zvekurapa muVienna, aiedza nebhuruu regirazi rakazadzwa nemvura munenge muna 1900 kuti awedzere chiedza apo mamwe madiki akawedzerwa akaenda pasi sechando. "Snowfall" mhedzisiro inoita kunge yaive netsaona, uye akazochinja pfungwa yacho kuita bhuruu remhando yezviyeuchidzo. Tsaona yaPerzy yakanga isiri iyo yekutanga inozivikanwa muenzaniso weiyo pfungwa. Chirevo chehurumende yeUS pa1878 Paris Universal Exposition chakatsanangura mapepa akaitwa nemvura akazara nemapapu egirazi akazara nemvura akaunza dutu-rakaita kunge dutu kana akachinjwa. Kwemakore, runyerekupe rwakafamba online kuti bhuruu rekutanga rechando rakagadzirwa netsaona.

claim: Gurukota rezvematongerwo enyika, Amit Shah, anodonhedza mureza wenyika paunenge uchitambanudza pazuva rekuzvitonga muna 2025.
evidence: Chokwadi: Chirevo ichi chinotsausa.Vhidhiyo inoratidza Amit Shah achionekwa achirova nekuburitsa Tricolor yakaitika muna 2018.Hyderabad: India neChishanu yakapemberera zuva rayo re79 reRusununguko nekushingairira kwenyika, ichipemberera makore 78 kubva payakawana rusununguko kubva kuhurumende yeBritain muna 1947.Mutungamiriri weNyika Narendra Modi akasimudza mureza wenyika paRed Fort uye akataura kunyika pasi pemusoro wenyaya 'Naya Bharat,' achisimbisa chiratidzo cheIndia yakazvimirira uye yakabudirira.Zvino, vhidhiyo yeIndia Gurukota rezvemukati Amit Shah achionekwa achirova mureza wenyika achirova nekusimudza yakaparadzirwa pasocial media, ichiti vhidhiyo iyi yakaburitswa paZuva Rekuzvimirira 2025.Mushandisi wevhidhiyo akagovana vhidhiyo yakafanana naShah, "Amit Adependent Day" (Independence Day) #20 In India, puranga rakasvika #20 Aishame!

claim: Muna December 2025, Mutungamiri weUnited States, Donald Trump, akazivisa kuti Magnetic Resonance Imaging scan yakaitwa pauropi hwake "haana kuwana chinhu".
evidence: Muna December 2025, runyerekupe rwekuti Mutungamiri weUnited States Donald Trump akazivisa kuti MRI scan yeuropi hwake "haisi kuwana chinhu" rwakabuda paIndaneti (yakanyorwa): WASHINGTON Kuzvirumbidza nezvehutano hwake hwekunzwisisa, neMuvhuro Donald J. Trump akataura kuti MRI yakaitwa pauropi hwake haina kuwana chinhu. "Ndakanga ndine MRI yakakwana", akaudza vatori venhau. "Vanachiremba vakuru munyika vakatarisa muuropi hwangu vakabuda vasina chinhu". Trump akati pakanga pasina chikonzero chekuburitsa MRI yake nekuti "hapana chinhu chekuona", achiwedzera kuti, "Zvakafanana neEast Wing Sean".

claim: America yaive nehurumende yeAmerica ine mari yakawanda ye ice cream muna 2020 pasi pehutungamiriri hwaMutungamiri Trump, asi mari iyoyo yakachinja kuva mari shoma yeAmerica ine mari inosvika $40.6 mamiriyoni pasi peMutungamiri Biden.
evidence: Hurumende yaMutungamiri Donald Trump yakapa chivimbo chakasimba kune mutungamiri waTrump, Joe Biden, uyo aida ice cream, ichiti akatungamirira indasitiri yeAmerica mumugwagwa une makomo wehupfumi. "America yaive nehupfumi hwakawanda hwezvokutengeserana muice cream muna 2020 pasi pehutungamiri hwaMutungamiri Trump, asi hupfumi ihwohwo hwakachinja kuva kushomeka kwekutengeserana kwemadhora makumi mana nematanhatu emadhora pasi peMutungamiri Biden", hofisi yeU.S. Trade Representative yakanyora musi wa20 Chikunguru paX. Chinyorwa ichi chaisanganisira chati inoratidza kushomeka kwekutengeserana kweUS neIce cream neJapan, South Africa, European Union, Brazil, uye Turkey. US ice cream trade balance yakachinja zvakanyanya mugore rakapinda Biden pachigaro.

claim: Hurumende yaTrump haina kungobvisa mari yeNational Weather Service chete asiwo yeiyo inozivikanwa seNOAA.
evidence: Mvura yenyika yeTexas yakauraya vanhu vanopfuura zana kusanganisira vasikana mumusasa wezhizha yakaunza pfungwa itsva yekudzimwa kwemabasa kusangano rehurumende rinosanganisira National Weather Service.Chinyorwa cheTikTok cheJuly 6 chakataura kuti Mutungamiri Donald Trump akabvisa mari yeNational Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.TikTok yakabviswa mushure mekunge tatanga kuongorora kwedu chokwadi, asi takawana vhidhiyo yakagovaniswawo paX  uye kutaura kuti NOAA nehurumende yemamiriro ekunze yakanga yabviswa mari kwakagovaniswawo nemamwe mapuratifomu. claim: Vaimbova Mutungamiri weRussia, Dmitry Medvedev, vakati muna June 2025 kuti "nyika dzakawanda dzakagadzirira kupa zvakananga Iran zvombo zvavo zvenyukireya".

claim: Zvinyorwa zvairatidza zvechokwadi tsamba iyo US Attorney General Pam Bondi akatumira kuna FBI Director Kash Patel pamusoro peEpstein mafaira muna February 2025.
evidence: Pamusoro pechirongwa ichi Kutevera chiziviso chaJuly 2025 kubva kuU.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) neFBI icho chakanzi mutadzi wepabonde akatongwa Jeffrey Epstein haana kuchengeta "ruzivo rwevatengi"  Kusiyana nerunyerekupe rwunoramba ruchiitika  vamwe vashandisi venhau dzezvemagariro vakagovana skrini yekunyorwa tsamba iyo yavanoti inopesana nekuwanikwa kwepamutemo. US Attorney General Pam Bondi akatumira tsamba inonzi yakanyorwa musi waFebruary 27, 2025, kuna FBI Director Kash Patel, maererano nemagariro enhau. Mutsamba iyi, Bondi "akabvuma kugamuchira mafaira epamutongi epamutongi epamutongi wepabonde ane" "ruzivo rwevatengi uye rondedzero yemazita evakaurayiwa", mushandisi weFacebook uyo akataura kuti tsamba yacho yainge yakanyorwa. Vadzidzi veSnopes Bondi vakatitumira email uye vakabvunza kuti tsamba iyi yakanyorwa naPatel, 27 Kukadzi, yakaiswa.

claim: Mumwe munyori weConservative Charlie Kirk akambotaura kuti kana aiva nemwanasikana ane makore 10 akabatwa pamuviri pashure pokunge afukidzwa, aizoda kuti aberekere mwana wacho.
evidence: Mumwe mubvunzo waive wechokwadi, kunyange zvazvo Kirk aiva nemwanasikana mudiki panguva iyoyo. Mushure mekunge nyanzvi inochengetedza pfungwa Charlie Kirk akapfurwa nemoto musi waSeptember 10, 2025, panguva yechiitiko kuUtah Valley University, vashandisi venhau dzekudyidzana vakagovana zvinyorwa zvakawanda zvine zvirevo zvaKirk zvaifanirwa kunge zvakagadzirwa. Chimwe chirevo chakagovaniswa pamapuratifomu akawanda ndechekuti Kirk akamboti kana akava nemwanasikana ane makore gumi akabata pamuviri mushure mekubatwa chibharo, angada kuti aberekwe. Vaverengi veSnopes vakatsvaga saiti vachitsvaga rumwe ruzivo nezve chirevo ichi. Chinyorwa chakagovaniswa neFeminist News (@feminist_news_now) Takaona kuti chirevo ichi chaive chechokwadi. Chakabva pavhidhiyo yeYouTube ya2024 yakaburitswa neLiberal Jubilee nechikamu chakanziviswa kuti "Can 25e Students Omart 1 bit Conservative?"

claim: Fact Check: WHO haina kubvumidza mishonga yekumba yeCOVID-19, usadonha kune zvisirizvo ruzivo.
evidence: Kunyange zvazvo tingadavira kuti chimwe chinhu chakadai ichokwadi, kusvika pari zvino hapana mushonga kana kurapwa, kunyanya mishonga yemumba, yakawanikwa ichishanda pakudzima hutachiona. Izvo hazvina kubvumidzwa neWHO kana chero imwe sangano rezvehutano. Chirevo ichi chinotaura nezve musanganiswa wakagadzirwa nezvinhu zvakapusa zvekubikira zvakaita sekurukurika, ginger uye uchi izvo kana zvikatorwa kwemazuva mashanu zvinogona kupwanya kupararira kwehutachiona. Kunyange zvazvo izvi zvese zvingave zvinoshanda sezvakanaka kwazvo kurwisa hutachiona (uye kubatsira kurwisa kutonhora kwakanyanya), hapana chokwadi kune chirevo chekuti mushonga uyu wepamba unogona kurapa COVID-19.

claim: Hurumende yeIndia iri kupa mari kumhuri dzakafirwa neCOVID-19 - Inishuwarenzi yekufa kweCovid-19 inogona kubvunzwa pasi pehurongwa hwePMJJBY nePMSBY.

claim: Muna 2013, muzvinabhizimisi uye mutambi weTV yechokwadi panguva iyoyo, Donald Trump akati: "Kuvharirwa kwehurumende kunoitika nekuda kwekushayikwa kwehutungamiriri hwemutungamiri wenyika. ndinoreva kuti matambudziko anotanga kubva kumusoro uye anofanirwa kugadziriswa kubva kumusoro.Kuvharirwa kunoreva kuti mutungamiri haana simba".

claim: Soursop ine simba kanokwana ka10 000 kupfuura chemotherapy
evidence: Soursop inotsiva chemotherapy here? Soursop inoshanda zvirinani kupfuura chemotherapy here? Kwete. Hapana humbowo hwesainzi hwekuti soursop ine simba rakapetwa ka10 000 pane chemotherapy. Zvidzidzo zvelabor uye zvemhuka zviripo, asi hapana kuongororwa kwevanhu kunotsigira chirevo ichi. Iyo inonyanya kutaurwa 2.3% chemo statistics inoshandiswa zvisiri izvo uye inotorwa kunze kwehuwandu. Soursop inogona zvakare kukonzera mhedzisiro senge kukuvara kwetsinga uye chiropa. Kuishandisa panzvimbo yekurapa kwakaratidzwa kunogona kuve nengozi. Yakapedzisira kugadziriswa muna Chikunguru 3, 2025 naDr Priyamvada Quick Take A social media post inotaura kuti soursop ine simba rekenza. Inoti soursop ine simba rakapetwa ka10 000 pane chemotherapy. Mushure mekuongorora chokwadi, takaona kuti ichi hachisi chokwadi. Kutaura kwekunyepa kweanotsigira soursop yekenza. Iko kune simba, uye mishonga yemakemikari, inotaura kuti inobatsira, chokwadi chekuti hapana zvikonzero zvinopfuura zviuru zvishanu zvekurapa chemotherapy

claim: National Lok Adalat yenyika yose yakarongwa musi wa13 Zvita 2025 ichapa zvidzikiso zvikuru pamatambudziko emota ari kumira.
evidence: Zvimwe zvinyorwa (pano, pano) pasocial media zviri kupararira, zvichitaura kuti National Lok Adalat yenyika yose ya13 Zvita 2025 ichapa vatyairi vemotokari mukana mukuru wekugadzirisa zvinetso zvemotokari zviri kutarisirwa nemotokari nemamwe marara anosvika 50% kusvika 100%, zvichienderana nedunhu.Nyika dzinotaurwa kuti dzinosanganisirwa ndiDelhi, Haryana, Punjab, Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Gujarat, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Karnataka, Rajasthan neWest Bengal. Zvisinei, chokwadi ndechekuti: Lok Lok Adalat 2025 yakatarwa kuti iite mabasa makuru (pano, pano).Nekuita kwechinyorwa ichi, ngatitarisei chokwadi chekuti chirevo chakaitwa mumapositi aya.Dhizha rekunyora chinyorwa ichi chinogona kuwanikwa pano.Chirevo: Lok Adalat National Lok Adalat yakatarwa kuti iite basa musi wa13 Zvita 2025 ichapa zvidzikiso pamasvikiro ari kutarisirwa.

claim: Murume wechiMuslim anorwisa mukadzi muresitorendi muIndia
evidence: Vhidhiyo inoratidza murume achirova mukadzi asati arohwa nevanoona pane zvinoita sekunge iri resitorendi iri kupararira pasocial media. Chinyorwa ichi chiri kugoverwa nemashoko ekuti murume wechiMuslim akatora mukadzi kuenda kunzvimbo yekudyira, akamurwisa paakaramba kuenda naye kuhotera, uye kuti akazomudzivirira mapurisa paakasvika. Mushandisi weFacebook akaisa chinyorwa ichi chakashata nemusoro unoti: "Pane husiku muDhabe maipa chikafu kuti hotera yaizoshanda". Musikana akati kuti jhaidhi yakatanga kurwisa musikana wacho mangwana. Musikana wacho akanga atova nekushambidza pfungwa paakauya kuzoponesa jhaidhi uye akaenda kunonyunyuta kumapurisa kuti tiri vaviri tiri kurwa. Saka vanhu vainge vauraya jhaidhi vanofanira kuurayiwa. Saka vanhu vainge vabata vhidhiyo iyi vakaenda. Musikana wacho akaudza muDhabe kuti akanga apinda mujeri. Musikana wacho akauya kuzoponesa jhaidhi usiku hwekupedzisira, uye muDhavir akati musikana wacho akauya kuzoponesa jhaidhi.

claim: Mutungamiri weUnited States, Donald Trump, akati mapurisa muWashington, D.C., "akamira ipapo, uye vanhu vari kuvapfira mate kumeso uye havabvumirwi kuita chero chinhu. asi zvino vanobvumirwa kuita chero chavanoda".
evidence: Pamusoro pechiratidzo ichi Musi waAugust 11, 2025, Mutungamiri weUnited States, Donald Trump akazivisa "mhosva yekukurumidzira" muWashington, D.C., uye akatumira National Guard. Achitaura nezve mamiriro ezvinhu muguta guru se "kusateerera mutemo kwakakwana uye kwakakwana", maererano nemamwe mavhidhiyo, Trump anonzi akati mapurisa aizobvumidzwa "kuita chero chinhu chavanoda" mukupindura mhosva inooneka. Trump anonzi akati mapurisa "akamira ipapo, uye vanhu vari kusvikirwa mumeso avo uye havabvumirwi kuita chero chinhu. Asi zvino vanobvumirwa kuita chero chinhu chavanoda". Trump zvirokwazvo akaita zvataurwa pamusoro apa panguva yemusangano wake wevatori venhau achizivisa "mhosva yekukurumidzira" muD.C. Sezvakadaro, tinokoshesa izvi sekupihwa. Zvisinei, paakaita chiziviso ichi, Trump akashandisa Columbia Section 740 yeMutemo weMutemo weDemo, uyo unopa hurumende yeDemocracy simba rakakwana.

New Delhi (Vishvas News). West Bengal ichaita musarudzo dzegungano mumatanho maviri musi wa23 na29 Kubvumbi 2026, nemigumisiro ichziviswa musi wa4 Chivabvu.

claim: Kubva muna June 2025, mhuka iyi yakanga yaparara pashure pekunge mhuka yekupedzisira yafa.
evidence: Muna 2018, murume wekupedzisira wesango reNorthern White Rhinoceros akafa pachirongwa chekuchengetedza zvipfuwo kuKenya.Vashandi vakakwanisa kugadzira nekutarisa 35 emhando dzeNorthern White Rhinoceros, izvo zvavanotarisira kuti zvive muchikadzi weSouthern White Rhinoceros, inova mhando yevakoma veNorthern White Rhinoceros.Zvinoramba zvichibvunzwa kuti basa iri richabudirira here.Muna June 2025, pakaonekwa kuti rudzi rweNorthern White Rhinoceros rwakanga rwuripo uye kuti "mwakawanda wemakore" weNorthern White Rhinoceros wakange wabuda muFacebook, uye kuti "mwakawanda wemakore" weNorthern White Rhinoceros wakanga wava kuwanikwa.

claim: Imwe zoo muUK yakafanira kupatsanura boka remapapu mashanu eAfrica grey nekuti shiri dzaipopota vachirova vaenzi nevashandi.
evidence: Pamusoro pechikamu ichi muna Kubvumbi 2026, runyerekupe rwakabuda paIndaneti kuti zoo muUK yaifanira kupatsanura boka remapapaipi mashanu eAfrica grey nekuti shiri dzacho dzaipopota vaeni nevashandi.Imwe peji yeFacebook yakashambadza chirevo (yakachengetedzwa) pamwe nemufananidzo wemapaipi mashanu grey uye zvinyorwa zvakaiswa pamusoro pacho zvakadai sekuti, "Vakatuka mushanyi wese aifamba, vakanyemwerera pamwe chete, uye zoo yaifanira kuputsa boka racho mamwe mapaipi mazana maviri asati adzidzawo".Runyerekupe rwakabudawo pa Instagram (yakachengetedzwa) uye pa Instagram (yakachengetedzwa).Iyi yekupedzisira yakataura kuti mhuka dzacho dzaive muLincolnshire Wildlife Park, muFriskney, Lincolnshire.Mashoko mashoma, chirevo ndechechokwadi.Mukuru weLincolnshire Wildlife Park Steve Nichols akati paemail musi wa24 Kubvumbi 2025 kuti mapaipi mashanu aakatorwa neCovid-19 akaiswa panguva yedenda rechirwere, kunyange zvazvo akachengetwa pachikamu chebasa rechipatara, Els

claim: Iyo iPhone 12 haizouya nemahedhifoni uye charging adapter.
evidence: Nokubvisa charger uye mahedhifoni kubva mubhokisi rezvigadzirwa, Apple inoti ichacheka anopfuura mamirioni maviri ematani emagetsi emagetsi pagore, ayo akaenzana nekubvisa mota dzinenge mazana mana nemakumi mashanu emamiriyoni mumigwagwa pagore.Apple iri kubvisawo simba adapteri uye EarPods kubva pakurongedza kwe iPhone, ichideredzazve kuderedza kwekubvisa kabhoni uye ichidzivirira kuchera nekushandisa zvinhu zvinokosha, izvo zvinoita kuti zvive zvidiki uye zviri nyore kurongedza, uye zvinobvumira mabhokisi makumi manomwe muzana kuti atengeswe papallet.

claim: Chivi chikuru uye chisingaregererwi chemagazini eFrance Charlie Hebdo mukutuka chiso chitsvene cheMuporofita chakaburitsa pachena zvakare ruvengo uye hushamwari hwezvirongwa zvematongerwo enyika netsika zveWestern World pamusoro peIslam nenharaunda yeMuslim.
evidence: Nyaya iyi yakaona kutengesa kwakanyanya, asi yakashoropodzwa nemapoka akawanda echiMuslim.Panguva iyoyo Mutungamiri weFrance Jacques Chirac akabudisa chirevo achiti, "Zvinhu zvose zvinogona kukuvadza kutenda kwemumwe munhu, kunyanya kutenda kwechitendero, zvinofanira kudziviswa.Rusununguko rwokutaura kunofanira kushandiswa nemweya wemutoro. Charlie Hebdo akapindura nekuburitsa tsamba, yakasainwa nevanyori nevashandi vepamusoro gumi nevaviri, kusanganisira Salman Rushdie naAyaan Hirsi Ali, iyo yakanyora, muchikamu, Isu, vanyori, vatori venhau, uye vanhu vepamusoro, tinodana kuti tirambe hutongi hwechitendero uye kuti tisimudzire rusununguko, mikana yakaenzana uye tsika dzevanhu vose. Gore rakatevera racho Charlie Hebdo yakakwikwidza nemasangano maviri echiFrench yeMuslim, Mosque of Paris uye Union of Islamic Organizations yeFrance, kuti idhindise mifananidzo yechiDanish.

claim: Beetroot amla carrot juice inogona kurapa danho rechina rekenza mumazuva makumi mana
evidence: Hapana uchapupu hwesainzi hunoratidza kuti beetroot, amla, uye muto wekota zvinogona kurapa kenza yechikamu 4 here? Kwete. Hapana uchapupu hwesainzi hunoratidza kuti beetroot, amla, uye muto wekota unogona kurapa kenza yechikamu 4. Kunyange zvazvo majusi aya achibatsira mune zvekudya uye antioxidants, zvidzidzo zvinotsigira kushanda kwawo pakurwisa kenza zvinongotorwa chete pakuongorora kwemarabhoritari kana mhuka. Hazvina kurapwa kwekenza. Nyanzvi dzinokurudzira kushandisa chete mishonga yakatenderwa uye kubvunza vanachiremba vasati vaedza chero imwe nzira yekurapa. Last Updated on July 3, 2025 by Dr. Priyamvada Quick Take A social media post inoti beetroot, amla, uye muto wekota unogona kurapa kenza yechikamu 4 mumazuva 40. Mushure mekuongorora chokwadi, takaona kuti chirevo ichi hachisi chechokwadi. The Claim Anetro Instagram post inoratidza kuti beetroot inogona kurapa 4 mazuva chete.

claim: Mifananidzo mitatu inoratidza kuti Iran yakarwisa zvivako zveIsrael zveMossad muTel Aviv.
evidence: Nepo imwe yemifananidzo yehurumende yeIran ichitaura kuti mishonga yavo yakarova mahofisi makuru eIsrael's intelligence agency Mossad muTel Aviv, mifananidzo iri kupararira ichiti inoratidza kurwisa uye chivakwa chakakuvara, kunyange zvazvo Israeri ichinzi yakazviita zvishoma nekuratidza kukuvara kwaiitwa nzvimbo yekupaka mabhazi iri pedyo.Ipapo imwe yemifananidzo yehurumende inoti inoratidza mushandi weMossad akabatwa, uyo anonzi akasungwa nemakomba uye akatumirwa kuMossad's headquarters mushure mekunge asungwa muIran, vhidhiyo pfupi uye pikicha inonzi inoratidza mutakuri weIran unonzwika wepamusoro unobvisa mahofisi makuru ari kupararirawo zvakanyanya.Vhidhiyo dzakarekodhwa dzezvinyorwa dzinogona kuonekwa pano nepano.Check Newschecker akaona zvinyorwa zvinopenya zvemavara uye zvinyorwa zvakapusa zve "Mossad Factory" zvakaputsika mufananidzo weAI-based video, iyo yakaparadzwa neAI-based video detector, iyo yakataura kuti yakaparadza mifananidzo yese yeAI-based video, iyo yakapararira kune imwe nzvimbo.

evidence: Pamusoro pechikamu ichi Mutauriri weTexas Medical Board akasimbisa kuti musi waJuly 6, 2025, chirevo chake pamusoro pemurapi akaita "zvirevo zvine mutsindo zvematongerwo enyika" pamusoro pemugumo weJuly Fourth pamusoro pemvura inouraya muTexas chakanga chiri chekutaura kuna Dr. Christina Propst, chiremba paBlue Fish Pediatrics. Blue Fish Pediatrics yakati mumashoko akaitwa musi waJuly 5 ne6, 2025, kuti chiremba akataura nezvemvura inoitika muTexas iyo yakakonzera "kukanganisa kukuru uye kukanganisa" akanga asisiri kushanda pachirongwa ichi. Chirevo ichi hachina kutaura kuti chiremba wacho akadzingwa. claim: Unogona kutumira RBG meseji ku50409 kuti usayine chikumbiro chekuti senator wako arege kutsiva Ruth Bader Ginsberg mudare repamusoro kusvikira sarudzo dza2020 dzaitika
evidence: Tumira shoko rekuti resist kune Resistbot paApple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, kana kuti nekutumira mameseji ku50409 uye pindura mibvunzo yakatumirwa.Maminitsi mashoma, iweuchave waonana neCongress kana vamwe vako vakasarudzwa.Vhura tsamba yako kuti uwane mhedzisiro.Meseji uye data rates zvinogona kushanda kana ukashandisa SMS.Meseji frequency inosiyana.Text stop kusvika 50409 kumisa meseji dzese.Text help kusvika 50409 kuti uwane rubatsiro.Ona mazwi edu ekushandisa, ziviso yekuvanzika, uye mushandisi bill of rights.

claim: Muna September 2025, zvinyorwa zvemagariro evanhu zvakaonekwa zvechokwadi nemunyori wemutemo Alan Dershowitz achitaura nezveVanity Fair mubhuku raJeffrey Epstein rekuberekwa kwake kwe50th.
evidence: Muna September 2025, vanhu vezvenhau vakagovana chinyorwa chemugweta Alan Dershowitz icho chainzi chaiva mubhuku remashoko emari yemunhu aizivikanwa sezvemari Jeffrey Epstein pazuva rake rekuzvarwa rechi50 muna 2003. Epstein, uyo anonzi aiva neukama nevanhu vakawanda, akazviuraya ari mujeri muna 2019 achimirira kutongwa mhosva yekutengesa zvepabonde. Musi waSeptember 8, US House Oversight Committee yakapa chinyorwa chemusi wekuzvarwa kwaDersstein mushure mekunge yakumbira kuti aite zvinyorwa zvakasiyana-siyana zvine chekuita nemutadzipombwe.

claim: Ndege yeAir India AI 315 yakapinda mumoto payakamhara muDelhi, vafambi vakachengeteka
evidence: Vishvas News, mukuferefeta kwayo, yakaona kuti pikicha iyi yehutachiona haisi yechangobva kuitika, asi ndeyekare. Mufananidzo uyu unoratidza moto wakaputika muinjini yendege yeAir India Express yaienda kuKochi paMuscat airport. Zvisinei, parizvino iri kuparadzirwa zvisiri izvo sechiitiko chazvino chemoto muAir India ndege paDelhi airport. New Delhi (Vishvas News). Moto wakaputika muchikamu chemagetsi cheAir India ndege paDelhi airport. Tsaona iyi yakaitika panguva yekumhara kwendege. Vese vafambi nenhengo dzechikwata vakachengeteka. Zvino, maererano neizvi, pikicha iri kupararira pasocial media ichiona utsi huri kubuda kubva kumberi kwechikwata chechikepe. Vamwe vanhu vanogonawo kuonekwa vakamira pedyo. Vashandisi vari kutaura kuti pikicha iyi ichangobva kuitika uye inoratidza moto uri muDelhi ndege yekare AI-315 muSavas News. Vashandisi veongororo, Vashandisi veNews, vakawana kuti moto uyu wakaitika panguva yekumhara.

claim: Mukutsinhana kweemail nemumwe wake Ghislaine Maxwell kwakaburitswa neDare reHurumende reChamber of Oversight munaNovember 2025, mutadzi wepabonde Jeffrey Epstein akadana Mutungamiri weUnited States Donald Trump kuti "imbwa isina kubvarura" uye akataura kuti Trump akapedza maawa akawanda ari pamwe chete nemunhu akatengeswa paimba yaEpstein.

claim: Unogona kutumira RBG meseji ku50409 kuti usayine chikumbiro chekuti senator wako arege kutsiva Ruth Bader Ginsberg mudare repamusoro kusvikira sarudzo dza2020 dzaitika
evidence: Tumira shoko rekuti resist kuna Resistbot paApple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, kana kuti nekutumira mameseji ku50409 uye upindure mibvunzo yakatumirwa.Maminitsi mashoma, iwe uchange waonana neCongress kana vamwe vako vakasarudzwa.Vhura tsamba yako kuti uwane simba rakakura. ... Haufanire kutanga wawana vamiririri vako, Resistbot ichazviitira iwe. Inogona kunyora tsamba yako kubva kunhamba yebhiri kana chinyorwa chenhau, kana kuti iwe unogona kunyora tsamba iwe pachako.

claim: Nancy Pelosi anoti China yaizofarira Joe Biden.
evidence: Russia iri kushanda kuti ikunde Biden; China neIran iri kuda Trump kupfuura US Russia iri kushanda kuti "ishorese" mutungamiri wedare reDemocratic Joe Biden, nepo China ichiona Mutungamiri Donald Trump se "asingatauriki" uye ichishuva kuti asahwina musarudzo, sekufungidzira kutsva kweU.S. Intelligence. Kuongorora uku, kwakaburitswa neChishanu nemukuru weNational Counter-Intelligence and Security Center, kwakabva kwaperawo kuti Iran iri kushanda kuti ikurudzire kupesana uye kusvibisa Trump pamberi pemasarudzo e2020. "Kufungidzira kweTehran kuita mabasa akadaro, chikamu, kunotungamirirwa nekufungidzira kuti kusarudzwazve kwaMutungamiri Trump kwaizoita kuti kuenderera mberi kwekumanikidza kweAmerica kuIran", kuongorora uku kwakawedzera kuti kutyisidzira kwaivewo kwekutya kuti hurumende yaTrump yaizosundira shanduko yehurumende kuIran.

claim: Vanenge 40% yevashandi vekurima vese veUS ndevatorwa vasina magwaro.
evidence: Nezve izvi maererano neazvino nhamba dziripo kubva kuUSDA, vangangoita 40% yevashandi vekurima  avo vanoshanda nezvibereko, miriwo nezviyo, semuenzaniso  havana mvumo yepamutemo yekushanda muUnited States pakati pa2020 na2022. Iyo 40% nhamba yemakore 2020-2022 haina kusanganisira vashandi vekurima venguva pfupi pasi pechinzvimbo chepamutemo chekupinda  kana kusanganisira zvipfuyo kana vashandi vemapurazi emukaka. Zvinyorwa zve2023 uye gare gare zvaive zvisingawanikwe panguva yekunyora. Pakutanga kwa2025, vashandisi venhau dzezvemagariro vakatanga kugovana chirevo chekuti vangangoita 40% yevashandi vese vepurazi veUS vaive vasina gwaro. Zvinyorwa paX, Reddit neFacebook zvakatora chirevo chehuwandu. Mumwe akati, semuenzaniso, "kanenge 40% yevashandi vepurazi veAmerica vane gwaro rekupinda  kana kuti vanhu vemapurazi havana gwaro. Iyi data ye2023 uye gare gare yakanga isingawanikwe panguva yekunyora.

claim: Kutaura kuri kuitwa nevanhu vakawanda kunoratidza kuti Ajit Doval akakurudzira maIndia kuti abvise Amazon kuti ashande nesimba kuti United States iite hondo yemitero.
evidence: Chinyorwa chine chirevo chinofungidzirwa kuti chakaitwa naAjit Doval, National Security Advisor, chinokurudzira maIndia kuti abvise Amazon app senzira yekumanikidza hupfumi hweUnited States muhondo yemitero iri kuenderera mberi chakashambadzirwa pasocial media.Chirevo ichi chinoratidza kuti kuwedzerwa kukuru kwepuratifomu kwaizokanganisa zvakanyanya zvido zveAmerica.Ngatione kana Ajit Doval akaita chirevo ichi.Chinyorwa chiri pamusoro apa chinogona kuonekwa pano. (Archiv) NM VERIFIED NewsMobile yakasimbisa chirevo ichi uye yakawana kuti vhidhiyo yehutachiona yakanga ichitsausa.Chikwata cheNM chakatanga kuongorora kwayo nekutsvaga chirevo chehutachiona chakapihwa Ajit Doval maererano neAmazon uye hondo yehurumende yehurumende.Chirevo chehutachiona chinoratidza kuti maIndia anogona kupa simba rakasimba kuUnited States nekubvisa Amazon kubva pamushandirapamwe wavo.

claim: Muna December 2025, vashandi veU.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement muMinneapolis vakasunga mukadzi wekuAmerica ane makore 55 anonzi Sue Tincher uyo aiongorora basa ravo.
evidence: Nezve chiyero ichi, Snopes haana kukwanisa kusimbisa zvakazvimiririra kuti vamiririri vakatema mhete yaTincher. Izvo zvakataurwa nedzimwe nhau dzemuno. Mangwanani eDecember 9, 2025, US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents vakaita basa rekufambisa vanhu pedyo neNorth 21st uye North Oliver avenues muMinneapolis. Zvinoenderana nezvakatumirwa pasocial media, vamiririri vakasunga Sue Tincher, wechidiki wekuAmerica, ane makore 55, uyo aiongorora mashandiro acho. Paaiva ari mujeri, maererano nezvakatumirwa, vamiririri vakatyisidzira Snopcher kuti apfume nemupunga uye vakagura mhete yake. Vaverengi veSnopes vakatsvaga nzvimbo yacho uye vakatitumira email kuti vaone kana zvinyorwa zvacho zvaive zvechokwadi. Takaona kuti ndizvo, kunyange zvazvo Tincher asina kukwanisa kusimbisa zvakazvimiririra kuti vamiririri vakanga vanyora mhete yaTincher achiri mujeri. Zvisinei, vashoma vakataura nemashoko avo vakataura kune imwe nzvimbo, vachiti Snopes-spray uye vakacheka mhete yake.

claim: Actor Christian Bale ari kuvaka dzimba gumi nembiri mumusha wemadhora mamirioni makumi maviri nemashanu muPalmdale, California, uyo unovavarira kuchengetedza vanin'ina nevanin'ina vari muchivanze chekurera pamwe chete.
evidence: Pamusoro pechikamu ichi muna June 2025, chirevo (chakarekodhwa) chakaparadzirwa paIndaneti kuti mutambi weBatman Christian Bale akanga achivaka dzimba 12 mumusha wemadhora $22 miriyoni muPalmdale, California, uyo waiva nechinangwa chekuchengeta vanun'una nevanun'una vari muchengeti pamwe chete. Chimwe chirevo chakakurumbira cheFacebook chaiti: "Christian Bale Ari Kuvaka 12 Foster Homes That Aim To Keep Siblings in the Foster Care System Together and Under the Same Roof". Chirevo ichi chakaparadzirwa paX (chakarekodhwa), Instagram (chakarekodhwa) uye Bluesky (chakarekodhwa), uko zvinyorwa zvaisanganisira mutengo unofungidzirwa wemadhora $22 miriyoni wekuvandudza. Vaverengi veSnopes vakatsvagawo nzvimbo yedu kuti vawane rumwe ruzivo nezve runyerekupe. Chirevo chinotyisa ichokwadi. uye pamwe chete neKalifornia, sangano rakatangwa nemutambi; mudzimai wake, Sibi; uye University of California, Los Angeles, Dr. Eric Esra, vakavhura pasi nzvimbo yeprojekti

claim: Gurukota rezvekunze reAfghanistan Amir Khan Muttaqi akazivisa zvirongwa zvekuvaka temberi dzechiHindu muKabul neKandahar nerubatsiro rwemari kubva kuIndia.

Chirevo chakadai chakanga chisina kuwanikwa pachena panguva yekuburitswa.Pakupera kwaGumiguru 2025, vashandisi venhau vakati Chobani aive nemhosva yekurwira vamwe vezviuru zvayo "zvisina maturo" vachiti mamwe ema yogurt ayo ane makemikari anonzi phthalates ayo akabatanidzwa nekukanganiswa kwehomoni.Zvinobva pane chinyorwa cheFacebook (chakarongedzwa), mutongo unoti Chobani "akashingairira kushambadzira kwenhema nekumaka zvimwe zvigadzirwa se 'zvisina maturo,'" kunyangwe paine bvunzo dzakazvimirira dzekuona mhando dzakasiyana dze phthalates mune ayo asiri echinyakare uye mukaka wakachena Greek ma yogurt.Phthalates anonzi ane chekuita nenjodzi dzakadai sematambudziko ehutano uye nyaya dzekurera, uye mamwe akaiswa semotokari dzinogona kuitika, mutero wevanhu (akachengetedzwa), mutero weChobani unotaura

claim: Munhu wese anogona kuwana  mushonga weCovid-19.
evidence: "Wakabata chiratidzo chikuru chaiti wainyepa pawakataura izvozvo here?" Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., akabvunza Kennedy. Musi wa27 Nyamavhuvhu, US Food and Drug Administration yakagadziridza nhungamiro yayo yejekiseni reCovid-19, ichideredza mapoka evanhu vakabvumirwa kuwana jekiseni rakagadziridzwa kune chero munhu ane makore 65 zvichikwira uye chero munhu ane mwedzi mitanhatu zvichikwira ane mamiriro ehutano anowedzera njodzi yavo yekurwara neCovid-19. Kennedy akadzosera, "Munhu wese anogona kuwana booster", akadaro Warren, achibva azowedzera kuti "haisi yehutano hwevanhu".

claim: Masiki echiso anokonzera hypoxia.

claim: Zviri mukati mehurongwa hwekunyengera, Radio Quebec, inotungamirwa naAlexis Cossette-Trudel zvinorambidzwa neFacebook.

Hysteria yakapoteredza nguva pfupi yadarika yakaisa vanhu munjodzi chaiyo. nepo vamwe vatendi vakaita kuoneka kwechokwadi, kazhinji vateveri vepfungwa yekunyengera isina hwaro vakaiswa zvakanyanya kumakona emvura yeinternet. Uyezve, neChipiri manheru ano, yakatanga kupinda mumutsara mukuru. Pane mumwe munhu akabata chiratidzo pamusoro pekunyengera, muchiratidzo chakajeka chaTrump, paTV yepamhepo.

claim: Jackie Mitchell, musikana ane makore 17 okukura, akarova nhoroondo dzebhasikoro Babe Ruth naLou Gehrig shure shure shure mukutamba kwa1931 pakati peChattanooga Lookouts neNew York Yankees.

Somuenzaniso, imwe posvo inonyanya kufarirwa (yakanyorwa) yakati Jackie Mitchell ane makore 17 akatora mutambi wemutambi mumutambo wekuratidzira weChattanooga Lookouts uye akarova vatambi vaviri vakuru shure kwegore, asi mutungamiriri wechikoro akadzima chibvumirano chake ndokutaura kuti mutambo uyu "wakaoma kwazvo" kune vakadzi mazuva mushure mekubudirira kwaMitchell.

claim: Nei uchifanira kubhadhara mitero yakawanda kupfuura inobhadharwa naDonald Trump? Uye ichocho ichokwadi. $750. Rangarira zvaakataura paakazvisimudza nguva pfupi yadarika, kuti anobhadhara sei chete ... Akati, Nokuti ndiri  akangwara. Ndinoziva kutamba nehurongwa.

Vakazviedza pane "lymphosoma" (yava kunzi non-Hodgkins lymphoma) murwere, uye havana kutaura zvakananga nezvegasiti yemastard kuitira kuti vanyorese. Zvisinei ... ... Masayendisiti akanga achitsvakurudza mishonga yemakemikari kwemakore apfuura, achishandisa mbeva kuti aedze. Kunyange zvazvo mhedzisiro yekuedzwa kwevanhu yakanga ichivimbisa, musanganiswa wekuuraya lymphite waiva mumwe chete wemishonga yakawanda yekugadzira yakaratidza kuti yakanga yapararira paIndaneti. Muna 2025, hurukuro yakatanga kuti mishonga yemakemikari yaizotanga kushandiswa muUnited States mushure mekunge gore ra1946 rapera, "Sharda" yakatanga kutaura kuti mishonga yemakemikari yemakemikari (Sharda)

claim: Mabheya mashanu e beluga akaburukira kumhenderekedzo muKamchatka, Russia, zuva rimwe chete kudengenyeka kwenyika kwakakura 8.8 kusati kwaitika munzvimbo iyi.

Hapana mishumo inotenda inoratidza kuti chiitiko chakadai chakaitika. Nyika mbiri idzi dzakati chirevo ichi chakagadzirwa. Inoti ngarava yePhilippine yeBRP Magat Salamat yakasvika kumachikepe ehove muSulu Sea, ichikurudzira ngarava yeMalaysia yepatrol KD Pahang kuburitsa yambiro yakasimba ichirayira ngarava yePhilippine kuti ibve. Vhidhiyo yacho yakawedzera kuti dambudziko rakanyanya kukura ngarava yacho payakaramba kudzoka. Mumwe mutauri wePhilippine akati: "Kwemawa mbiri, ngarava mbiri dzePhilippine dzakaramba dzichifamba mazana emamita. Pfuti dzavo uye mauto avo aigona kuonekwa mumasiteshi gumi chete ehondo, uye imwe neimwe ye

claim: Mureza wenyika yePakistan wakasimudzwa pamusangano weDMK.
evidence: Mufananidzo waM K Stalin akakomberedzwa nemabhegi akasvibirira ari kugoverwa zvakanyanya pasocial media zvichiti mireza yenyika yePakistan yakasimudzwa pamusangano weDravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) panguva yesarudzo dzeTamil Nadu Assembly. Mushandisi weFacebook akatumira chinyorwa chehutachiona nemusoro unoti: Unogona kutarisa chinyorwa pano. NM VERIFIED NewsMobile yakaongorora chinyorwa chehutachiona ndokuwana kuti zvirevo zvacho ndezvenhema. Patakaongorora mufananidzo wacho zvakanyatsonaka, takaona kuti mireza yakasvibirira inoonekwa muchimiro ichi haisi yePakistan. Asi, inomiririra Indian Union Muslim League (IUML), iyo inoshandisa mureza wakasvibirira une crescent uye nyeredzi. Kunyange zvazvo iri yakafanana nemaziso, mureza weIUML wakasiyana nePakistan's flag inotaridzika zvakanaka uye ine hukuru. Kuongorora uku kwakawedzera kwakaratidza kuti mufananidzo uyu wakaburitswa ne Front of Stalin uye mishumo yemagariro evanhu yakadai sechifananidzo chakaratidzwa neDemo cheNatalinan, chichi

claim: The New York Mets yakatsiva mureza weU.S. nePride mureza apo nziyo yenyika yakaimbwa pamutambo webhaseball musi wa13 June 2025.
evidence: Nezve izvi Pakati paJune 2025, vhidhiyo yemasekondi mashanu yakaparadzirwa online yakaratidza mureza wePride pa jumbotron kuNew York Mets' Citi Field stadium.Vashandisi venhau dzezvemagariro vakati mureza uyu wakatsiva mureza weUS apo rwiyo rwenyika rwairidzwa.Kunyangwe vanhu vasina kutsanangura mutambo waiitika izvi, runyerekupe rwakapararira mushure meChitatu chePride Night chechikwata chegore negore, vachipemberera vateveri veLGBTQ+ uye kuverengerwa mubaseball, musi waJune 13, iyo yakaitika nemutambo wavo vachipesana neTampa Bay Rays.Mumwe mushandisi weX akagovana clip (yakanyorwa) akanyora kuti: "KUBVA - The New York Mets vakasarudza kuratidza mureza wePride panzvimbo yeAmerican mureza panguva yerwiyo rwenyika. "Chinyorwa ichi chainge chaunganidza maonero anopfuura mamirioni matanhatu kubva panguva yekunyora.

claim: Munyori weUnited States weHomeland Security Kristi Noem akatenda Mutungamiri Donald Trump nekusagadzikana kwemwaka wemadutu we2025 muUnited States, achiti, "Makaramba muchichengeta madutu kure".
evidence: Pamusoro pechikamu ichi chemusangano weCabinet wakabudiswa pachena musi waDecember 2, 2025, Noem akataura zvechokwadi kuti, "Changamire, makabudirira mumwaka wemadutu pasina dutu. Saka, FEMA, FEMA ... iwe, kunyange iwe wakachengeta madutu kure, saka tinotenda izvozvo". Zvisinei, kuseka kunonzwika pamwe chete naNoem akaenderera mberi nemashoko ake eFEMA akaratidza kuti imba yakagamuchira chirevo chekuti "wakachengeta madutu kure" sechinhu chisina basa. Mashoko akabuda paIndaneti kutanga kwaDecember 2025 akataura kuti US Secretary of Homeland Security, Kristi Noem, akatenda Mutungamiri Donald Trump nekuchengeta madutu kure nenyika kuburikidza nedutu ra2025, zvichitevera chirevo cheNoem panguva yemusangano weCabinet weWhite House wakabudiswa pachena musi waDec. 2.

claim: Pakupera kwaApril 2026, vashandi veDemocrats muSeneti yeMinnesota vakavhota nemashoko akafanana vachipikisa kubvisa vakafa pamazita evhoti edunhu.
evidence: Nezve izvi, nhoroondo yevakafa vari musystem inoshandiswa nevakuru vemunharaunda uye vemunyika dzesarudzo kuti vabate vanhu vanoedza kuvhota kana kunyoresa kuvhota vachishandisa chiziviso chemunhu akafa.Pakupera kwaApril 2026, chirevo chakapararira paIndaneti chekuti Minnesota State Democratic senators "vakangobva" vakabvumirana zvachose kubvisa vakafa kubva pamanyoro ehurumende.Mushandisi X (akachengetedzwa) akafunga kuti SAVE America, mutemo waizosimbisa zvakanyanya zvinodiwa pakuzivikanwa kwevashandisi, Mutemo weMDC weMNOSE wakanga uchitaura kuti: "Mushandisi weMDC weMNOSE anofanira kungopedza nguva yekuvhota kubva pamanyoro ehurumende".

claim: "Vanhu veSouth Africa vanosvika mamiriyoni 12,4 havana basa".  Mmusi Maimane
evidence: Takashandisa mashoko mashanu emutungamiri wenyika nezvemari, uye zvose zvaiva zvechokwadi. Ramaphosa aiva nemari paakaona kuti GDP yakanga yakura zvakanaka, nyika yaiva nehuwandu hwevanhu hwakaderera mumakore 20 uye mitengo yemitero nechikwereti zvainge zvaderera. Zvinhu zvishanu zvaiti nhengo dzezvematongerwo enyika dzakanga dzisina basa zvakanga zvakarurama kana kuti pedyo nazvo. John Steenhuisen weDemocratic Alliance akanga akarurama kuti kushaya basa kwaiva padanho rakaderera mumakore mashanu, asi vamwe vake vakataura kuti izvi zvaiita kuti vanhu vemunyika yeSouth Africa vave nemabasa emamiriyoni 12,4 kusanganisira 35.8% yevanhu vatema vekuSouth Africa. Nhengo mbiri dzeMkhonto weSizwe Party dzakanga dzisina kururama pamusoro pekuti vanhu veSouth Africa vainge vachikura nekukurumidza kupfuura hupfumi hwayo uye dzakanyanya kuvhiringidza nhamba yemhuri dzisina zvokudya, zvichiita kuti nhengo dzavo dzisave nehanya.

claim: Stanley tumblers ane ngozi chepfungwa kuti zvinogona kukonzera uturu kutungamirira panguva dzose kushandiswa.
evidence: Kubvira pakutanga kwa2024, hurukuro dzevanhu vezvenhau dzakatarisana nekuvapo kwechitima chebhuruu mune idzi tumblers, pamwe nekutaura kwakasiyana-siyana nezve njodzi dzinogona kuitika kuutano. Izvi zvakakonzera hurukuro yeruzhinji pamusoro pekuchengeteka kwechigadzirwa uye kuumbwa kwayo. Cheki yedu yechokwadi inoratidza kuti nepo Stanley tumblers ichinyatsosanganisira huwandu hwebhuruu mukuvaka kwavo, kuongororwa kwakazvimirira kunoratidza njodzi shoma panguva yekushandisa kwayo kwese. Social Media Claim Facebook vashandisi vanoti Stanley makapu anomiririra njodzi nekuda kwebhuruu mukuvaka kwavo, zvichiratidza kuti anogona kukonzera chepfu. Source Archive Archive.

claim: Sunil Gavaskar akati "Virat Kohli akangoita maekisesaizi achirwisa Anushka [Sharma] panguva yekuvharirwa"
evidence: Mune nyaya ye Instagram yakatumirwa zuva rimwe chete mushure mekunge timu yaKohli, Royal Challengers Bangalore, yarova mutambo weIPL zvakazara neKings XI Punjab, Sharma akatora chipingamupinyi kune chikamu chemashoko apo Gavaskar aitaura nezvekushayikwa kwekudzidzira kwaKohli nemumwe mutori wenhau Aakash Chopra. Gavaskar akati 'Haana kuwana mukana wekuita kudzidzira kwaunoda... Uye panguva yekuvharirwa, akangoita kurwisa Anushka achibhola sezvainoonekwa muvhidhiyo iyoyo. Izvo hazvisi kuzokwana.' Gavaskar aifunga nezve chikamu chemashoko enhau apo VaKohli vakakurukura kushaya kudzidzira kwaKohli nemumwe mutori wenhau Aakash Chopra. Gavaskar akati 'Haana kuwana mukana wekuita kurovedza muviri kwaunoda... Uye panguva yekuvharirwa, akangoita kurwisa kwaKohli sekufungwa kwavakaona muvhidhiyo iyoyo.

claim: Pasi paGovernor weMichigan Gretchen Whitmer, kune mhuri shoma dzinorarama murombo kupfuura dzaiva pasi pemutungamiri wenyika.
evidence: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer, uyo angangova musarudzo yemutungamiri wenyika yeDemocratic, achangobva kunyora nezvezvaakabudirira paakapinda mugore rake rekupedzisira achitungamira nyika. "Maitiro edu atungamira kune zvimwe zviitiko zvinoshamisa", Whitmer akanyora muchinyorwa cheFebruary 2 Substack. "Mahara pre-K, koreji yemunharaunda, uye chikafu chechikoro kune vese. Mhuri shoma dzinogara murombo". Chirevo chake chinokanganisa vanhu vekuAmerica nezvekutengeswa kwemari, izvo zvinogona kuve nyaya yakakosha kuvhoti mumasarudzo epakati, kusanganisira kukwikwidza kweSeneti yeUnited States muMichigan. Mutungamiri Donald Trump vimbiso yekuderedza mitengo yezvinhu zvinotengeswa, mota nezvimwe zvinhu yakamiswa paMAGA-Meter yedu, iyo inotarisa zvipikirwa zvake zvekushanda.

claim: Macy's yakanga ichibvisa paradhiso yayo yeThanksgiving muNew York City muna 2025 nekuti Meya-vakasarudzwa Zohran Mamdani aida kubhadharisa chitoro chemabhiriyoni gumi emadhora kuti ashandise Fifth Avenue.
evidence: Pashure pekunge Zohran Mamdani akunda musarudzo dzemutungamiriri weNew York City kutanga kwaNovember 2025, runyerekupe rwakazotanga kupararira paIndaneti kuti Macy's yakanga ichibvisa paradhishi yayo yegore negore yeThanksgiving nekuti meya-anotungamirwa aida kubhadharisa chitoro chemari yemamiriyoni gumi emadhora kuti ashandise Fifth Avenue. Semuenzaniso, peji reFacebook America's Last Line of Defense (ALLOD) rakashambadza meme ine zvinyorwa (zvakanyorwa): Vanhu vemuNew York vari kuzvidemba nekuvhota kwavo mushure mekunge Macy's yazivisa kupera kwemakore zana nemakumi maviri nemashanu erudzi rweThanksgiving. "Meya-Elect Mamdani anoda kuti tibhadhare mamiriyoni gumi emadhora kuti tirire 5th Avenue kwemaawa matatu, "akadaro Macy's CEO Joseph A Barron, "Tinofanira kubvuma".

claim: Nyaya yaPunch the Monkey yekuwana nyaradzo mumhuka yakasvibiswa mushure mekusiiwa pakuberekwa ndeyechokwadi.
evidence: Nezve izvi ratings Pakutanga kwa2026, mifananidzo nemavhidhiyo anoita kunge anoratidza mwana wemunyengeri akabata orangutan plush toy zvakabuda pachena pasocial media.Zvinyorwa paInternet  kusanganisira paX, TikTok uye Reddit zvakataura kuti "Punch the monkey" yakarambwa naamai vake uye yakatakura mhuka yakazadzwa kuti inyaradze.Panguva iyo Punch yaisvetukira pamwoyo pasi rese, vaverengi veSnopes vasina chokwadi vakatsvaga webhusaiti kuti vaone kururama kwenyaya.Vadzidzi vakati wandei vakatsvaga ruzivo rwekuti zvemukati zvemunyengeri yakasiiwa zvakagadzirwa nehunyanzvi.Punch the monkey uye rutsigiro rwake rwakadzikiswa orangutan ndeyechokwadi, maererano neX account yeIchiikawa City Zoo muJapan, nzvimbo yekugara yaPunch sezvinyorwa izvi.Zoo Asperree yakataura kuti yakaburitsa maoko ayo kune yepamutemo yeJapan mushure mekunge webhusaiti yeIchichaiki ichinyatsanangura kuti yakasiya macaque, asi vabereki vayo havana kuongorora kuti iyi ndeyechokwadi.

claim: Mutongi mukuru weIndia aripo iye zvino, B. R. Gavai, akadzorera chiratidzo chepakutanga cheDare Repamusorosoro, chine chirevo che Satyameva Jayate, chakashandurwa kuva Yato Dharmastato Jayah panguva yaitonga Mutongi Mukuru Chandrachud.
evidence: Chinyorwa ichi chinoti panguva yaimbova Mutongi Mukuru D. Y. Chandrachud, Dare Repamusorosoro rakatsiva chirevo charo kubva ku'Satyameva Jayate 'kuenda ku' Yato Dharmastato Jayah '.Zvinoti Mutongi Mukuru aripo, B. R. Gavai, akadzorera chiratidzo cheSupreme Court, chine chiratidzo chepakutanga che 'Satyameva Jayate' (pano, pano, pano, pano).Mune chinyorwa chino, ngatitarisei chokwadi chekuti chirevo chakaitwa muchinyorwa ichi.Vhidhiyo yakachengetedzwa yechinyorwa ichi inogona kuwanikwa pano.Chirevo: Mutongi mukuru weIndia aripo, B. R. Gavai, akadzorera chiratidzo chepakutanga cheDare, chine chiratidzo che 'Satyameva Jayate', chakashandurwa kuva 'Yato Dharmastato Jayat' panguva yekutonga kwaSatyamech.The Fact of the Supreme Court's current Chief Justice, Jay Jay Jayat, haana kumboita chiratidzo chepakutanga che 'Satyameva Jayate'

claim: Mutemo weSAVE America Act woizoita kuti vanhu vemuAmerica vanyorese chete, chimwe chinhu chinoitwa ne5% chete yevanhu vemuAmerica nhasi".
evidence: VaDemocrat vari kurwira zvakasimba Mutemo weSafeguard American Voter Eligibility Act, kana kuti SAVE America Act, unotsigirwa neRepublican, vachiti uchasimudza zvipingamupinyi zvevaAmerican vari kutsvaga kunyoresa kuvhota kana kuvhota.Sezvo Seneti yakatanga mazuva akati wandei ekurukurirano pamusoro pemutemo musi wa17 Kurume, Mutungamiri weSeneti Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., akasimbisa matambudziko aiti mutemo uyu waizokonzera. Mutemo uyu "waizomanikidza maAmerican kunyoresa (kuvhota) chete pachake, chimwe chinhu chinongoitwa ne5% chete yevanhu vemuAmerica nhasi", akaudza vatori venhau. Schumer akarurama kuti mutemo uyu waizoda kuti uchapupu hwehuwandu hwehuwandu hwehuwandu hwehuwandu hwevanhu vemuAmerica huve hunyorwe pachake kuti vavhote. Asi iye haana kururama nezvehuwandu hwevaAmerican vanonyoresa pachake, maererano nedata remubatanidzwa. Federal data inoratidza kuti inotsvaga huwandu hwehuwandu hwehuwandu hwehuwandu hwehuwandu hwevanhu. neM

claim: NASA tekinoroji yakawana "super-Earth" exoplanet inobudisa "chiratidzo chisingazivikanwe".
evidence: Zvisinei, "chiratidzo chinoshamisa" chakashandurwa mumashoko evanhu pazvinyorwa uye mumagariro evanhu nezvezvakawanikwa, kwete NASA kana vatsvakurudzi vacho. "Chiratidzo chinoshamisa" chinotaurwa kuti "chinoratidza chiratidzo chinopfuura nevanhu", icho "chinoratidza kuti nyika isiri kure nekuti tinoiona zvakananga kubva kumakore echiedza mazhinji, asi nokuti nyika iri kupfuura pamberi penyika yayo inodzikamisa chiedza chayo zvishoma", maererano neNASA. Mashoko aibuda pasocial media muna Ndira 2026 akataura kuti masayendisiti akawana "super-Earth" kunze kwehurongwa hwedu. Imwe nzvimbo paX yakataura kuti iyo inonzi super-Earth, TOI-1846b, yakabudiswa kaviri, ichitaura mashoko akafanana neaya, kusanganisira mashoko akafanana ne" Instagram, ayo akabudisa mashoko akafanana ne" Instagram, ayo akabudisa mashoko akafanana ne" Super-Earth" kunze kwezuva redu.

claim: Muna June 2025, mutengesi weBritish Piers Morgan uye muimbi weScotland Susan Boyle vakanga vavimbiswa kuroorana uye vachironga kuroorana.

claim: Kutsanya kunouraya masero ekenza mumazuva gumi nemashanu
evidence: Kukurumidza Tora A social media post inoratidza kuti kutsanya kunogona kuuraya masero ekenza mukati memazuva gumi nemashanu. Isu takanyatsoongorora uye takawana kuti chirevo ichi chakashata. The Claim Muvhidhiyo yeFacebook, mutengi anoti kana akambobvumidzwa kuti ane kenza, aizotsanya kwemazuva gumi nemashanu nekuti anotenda kuti kutsanya kunoparadza masero ekenza. Fact Check Kutsanya kunobvisa kenza mukati memazuva gumi nemashanu ekuonekwa? Kwete. Iko hakuna humbowo hwekiriniki hunoratidza kuti kutsanya kunoporesa kenza mukati memazuva gumi nemashanu kana zvachose. Kenza haisi chirwere chimwe chete. Inosanganisira mamiriro anopfuura mazana maviri akasiyana, chimwe nechimwe chine chimiro chakasarudzika chehupenyu, maitiro ekukura, uye mhinduro kurapwa. Mamwe mahwindo anokura nekukurumidza; kukura zvishoma nezvishoma. Mamwe anogamuchira zvakanaka makemikari; vamwe vanhu, vakatarwa, kana immunotherapy. Iko hakuna hunyanzvi hwekuongorora hunoratidza kuti kutsanya kunobvisa kukura kwehumba mukati memavhiki maviri kana zvachose. Zvisinei, kuongorora nekukurumidza uye kudzikisira mhuka

claim: Imwechete acupressure pfungwa inogona kubatsira kubvisa kurwadziwa kwemwedzi
evidence: Tora A social media post inoratidza kuti Acupressure inogona kubatsira kudzikisa marwadzo enguva. Isu takakurumidza kuongorora uye takawana kuti chirevo chacho chiri Half True. The Claim An instagram post inoti kudzvanya imwechete acupressure point (inowanzodaidzwa kuti SP6 kana "Sanyinjiao") kamwe chete kunoderedza kurwadziwa kwemwedzi. Fact Check Kunoderedza SP6 kunogadzira rubatsiro rwekusingaperi rwekurwadziwa? kusvika padanho rakati. Tsvagurudzo inoratidza kuti kudzvanya SP6, poindi iri mumutsoka wemukati uri pamusoro pebanzu, kunogona kuunza rubatsiro rwepfupi kune vamwe vakadzi, asi mhedzisiro yacho haisi yekusingaperi kune mukadzi wese. Zvidzidzo zvekiriniki zvakawana kuti kana vakadzi vakadzvanya SP6 panguva yavo, marwadzo avo akaudzwa anodonha mumaawa anotevera. Zvisinei, kurwadziwa kunowanzo kupera, uye kurwadziwa kunodzoka gare gare gare mumutambo mumwe chete. claim: Vaimbova Mutungamiri weUnited States, Barack Obama, vakabvisa mufananidzo waimbova Prime Minister weBritain, Winston Churchill muOval Office ndokuenda nawo kuEngland.
evidence: Pamusoro pechikamu ichi, mutungamiri waObama, George W. Bush, akachengeta Churchill bust muOval Office kubva muna 2001 kusvika pakupera kwehutungamiri hwake. Iyo bust yaive chikwereti kubva kuUK Government Art Collection. Obama paakatora basa, White House yakadzorera iyo yakadhindwa bust. Obama akaramba achiratidza imwe Churchill bust kunze kweTreaty Room panguva yehutungamiri hwake. Hapana humbowo hwekuti Bush's borrowed bust yakadzokera kunyika yeAtlantic pakutanga kwehutungamiri hwaObama. Iyo bust yakaramba iri paBritish Embassy muWashington, D.C., kusvika pakupedzisira 2012, maererano nemishumo inotaura nezve embassy. Ndiani akasarudza kudzorera Churchill bust iyo UK yakadzorera Bush yakanga isingazivikanwe panguva yekunyora uku. Obama akaonekwa achitaura pamusangano wenhau we2016 kuti akasarudza kutsiva Churchill neimwe yeMartin Luther King. Donald Trump Reports yakataura kuti hurumende yeBritain yakadzorera chikwereti ichi muna March 2026, uye kuti Trump akataura kuti hurumende yeBritain yakadzokorora chikwereti ichi nehurumende yeUnited States.

claim: Akati akatungamirira basa reDare reVatongi rekuvaka nzvimbo huru yeMicron semiconductor pedyo neSirakuse.
evidence: Rep. Claudia Tenney, ane nharaunda yeCongress inogara munzvimbo dzakawanda dzeCentral New York, achangobva kubvuma kubatsira kufambisa mberi chivakwa chikuru chemasekondakita muClay, N.Y., kuchamhembe kweSirakuse. "Zvaifadza kuputsa nzvimbo ne @MicronTech pane yayo nhoroondo yekudyara muNew York State", Tenney akanyora musi waX Jan. 16. "Chirongwa ichi chichaita mabasa zviuru makumi mashanu uye kusimbisa kugadzirwa kwemasekondakita epamba muNew York. Ndakave nerukudzo rwokutungamira basa iri muDare sezvo Congress yakasimbisa kuzvipira kweAmerica kune hunyanzvi & kukwikwidza kwenguva refu". Zvakanga zvichinakidza kuputsa nzvimbo ne @MicronTech pane yayo nhoroondo yekudyara muNew York State. Chirongwa ichi chichaita mabasa zviuru makumi mashanu uye kusimbisa kugadzirwa kwemasekondakita epamba muNew York State.

claim: Kupesana pakati peBJP gurukota uye mutariri wedunhu muUttar Pradesh
evidence: Vhidhiyo inoratidza varume vaviri vachiita nharo iri kupararira pasocial media.Clip iri kugoverwa nemashoko ekuti inoratidza kupesana pakati pemuranda weBJP nemuridzi wedunhu muUttar Pradesh.Mushandisi weFacebook akaisa chinyorwa chehutachiona nemusoro unoti: pasi rakatsemuka pakati pemuridzi wedunhu nemuridzi wedunhu reBJP....muUPR...😁 Kurwisana pakati pemuridzi wedunhu nemuridzi weBJP....mu UP... 😁 Unogona kutarisa chinyorwa pano.FACT CHECK NewsMobile yakaongorora chinyorwa chehutachiona ndokuwana kuti zvirevo zvacho ndezvechokwadi.Kuti uone kuti chirevo ichi, zvidimbu zvakakosha zvevhidhiyo iyi zvakabudiswa uye zvatsvakirwa uchishandisa kutsvaga mifananidzo.Izvi zvakakonzera chirevo chehupenyu chakabudiswa neABP Live musi wa17 Ndira 2018, icho chakashandura maonero akafanana.Mushumo wacho unoti, mupurisa weBJP haana kutora nzvimbo muUttar Pradesh mushure mekupesana kwakaitika.

claim: Munyori weDziviriro weUnited States, Pete Hegseth akati: "Zvinonetesa kutarisa mapoka ehondo, kana kuti chero mapoka, uye kuona mauto akakura, uyewo hazvigamuchiriki kuona majenarera uye ma admiral akakura muimba dzePentagon uye achitungamirira mauto munyika yose uye munyika yose".
evidence: Nezve izvi musi wa30 Gunyana 2025, Munyori weDziviriro weUnited States Pete Hegseth akashevedza musangano wevakuru vakuru vakuru kuQuantico Marine Corps base muVirginia, mune izvo zvinonzi nenhau dzakawanda musangano wekupedzisira-miniti.Pamusangano uyu, Hegseth akapa hurukuro kune vakaungana vakuru vaiti akashora "mafuta" mauto nemajeneraera.Vashandisi vazhinji vezvenhau vakaratidza zvikamu zveshoko raHegseth.Chimwe chinyorwa paX chakanzi: Hegseth anodana "mauto nemajeneraera". Anoti achienda mberi, nhengo yega yega yebasa ichafanira kupasa bvunzo yemuviri pagore kana vachida kuramba vari nhengo yebasa rakabatana. Anoti kuva musoja ane "mvura" "haigamu".

claim: Mamemo ehurumende yeUnited States akaburitswa akasimbisa kuti hurumende yeMutungamiri weUnited States, Donald Trump, yakanga ichiedza "kudzvinyirira kufamba kwemukati" mukati memiganhu yenyika pakati pa2025.
evidence: Pamusoro pechirongwa ichi, runyerekupe rwakabuda paIndaneti pakutanga kwaJuly 2025 rwakaudza kuti kuderedzwa kwemashoko ehurumende yeUnited States kwakaratidza kuti hurumende yeMutungamiri weUnited States, Donald Trump, yakanga ichiedza "kudzvinyirira kufamba kwemukati" mukati memiganhu yeUnited States chiito chakasiyana nekurambidzwa kwake kufamba munyika dzese.Vadzidzi veSnopes vakatsvaga nzvimbo yedu yepaIndaneti kuti vawane ruzivo nezvenyaya iyi. Mumwe muverengi akatumira Facebook reel zita raMeta kwemavhidhiyo mapfupi paFacebook ne Instagram  achiratidza mifananidzo yaTrump nemotokari yake muNetherlands munaJune 2025, pamwe chete nemapepa emhepo, zvinyorwa zvemashoko emuno uye mavhidhiyo emari.

claim: Mapurisa: Masangano ezvematongerwo enyika haana kukonzera moto weOregon.
evidence: Dutu risina kumbobvira raitika uye rinoshamisa munhoroondo rakaputika nemumakomo eCascade masikati eMuvhuro, Gunyana 7 kusvika mangwanani eChipiri, Gunyana 8, zvichikonzera kukura kwakakurumidza kwemoto wemusango.Izvi zviitiko zvemhepo hazvisi zvakajairika panguva ino yegore; mhepo dzakasimba dzakakura kudaro dzinowanzoonekwa mumwedzi yechando.Kunze kwekupisa, uyu mumwe muenzaniso wekuchinja kwemamiriro ekunze ari kuonekwa.

claim: Zvinyorwa zvinoratidza kuputika kweDelhi Red Fort kwakaitika musi wa10 Mbudzi 2025.
evidence: Musi wa10 Mbudzi 2025, mota yakaputika pedyo neGate No. 1 yeRed Fort metro station muNew Delhi, ichiuraya vanhu vanenge gumi nematatu uye ichikuvadza vamwe vakawanda.Tsvakurudzo yakaendeswa kuNational Investigation Agency (NIA), nevakuru vachishandisa mutemo unoti Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act uye vachiongorora zvinobatanidza nemudungwe wekutya (here, here).Mushure mechiitiko ichi, mifananidzo yakati wandei yakatanga kutenderera pasocial media, ichiti inoratidza mifananidzo kubva kuDelhi Red Fort kuputika.Ngativonei zvataurwa mune izvi zvinyorwa munyaya ino.Chirevo: Mifananidzo inoratidza kuputika kweDelhi Red Fort kwakaitika musi wa10 Mbudzi 2025.Chitendero: Hapana mufananidzo wehutachiona unobatanidzwa nekubuda kweDelhi Red Fort.Chinyorwa chekutanga ndechebhomba re2014 muBeirut's Haret Hreik, apo chechipiri chinyorwa cheHIS, chinoti chifananidzo che2024 chinoratidza moto kubva kuHezbollah, iyo yakaitwa mumhepo yeDelhi mushure mekuputiza kwezviitiko zvakawanda muBe

claim: Ongororo yakaitwa yakaona kuti 23% chete yevaAmerican ndivo vanogona kunongedzera kuIran pamepu.
evidence: Pamusoro pechikamu ichi, ongororo ye2020 yakawana kuti 23% yevhoti vakanyoreswa veUS  kwete vese vekuAmerica  vaigona kuziva Iran nemazvo pamepu yenyika isina kunyorwa. MunaKurume 2026, hondo yeUS neIsrael neIran ichiwedzera, zvinyorwa zvakapararira pasocial media zvakaratidza kuti chete 23% yevaAmerica vaigona kunongedza kuIran pamepu. Zvinyorwa izvi zvaiwanzove nemagirafu anoratidza mepu yeMiddle East uye zvaiwanzo govana kutonga ruzivo rwevaAmerica rwepanyika kana ruzivo rwezvematongerwo enyika. Semuenzaniso, mumwe mushandisi weX akagovana mufananidzo wakanzi "VaAmerican vakakumbirwa kunongedza kuIran pamepu", achitaura kuti: "Ndinovimba izvi hazvisizvo..." Mufananidzo uyu wakataura kuti "23% vakaona Iran nemazvo". "Vazhinji veAmerica havagoni kuwana Iran pamepu", mumwe mushandisi akapfupikisa mepu. Kwemakore, zvinyorwa zvepamutemo pamapepu kana ruzivo rwezvematongerwo enyika zveAmerica.

evidence: Pamusoro pechikamu ichi Mukupera kwaJuly 2025, runyerekupe rwakabuda paIndaneti kuti murume weArkansas akasungwa achifungidzirwa kuti akapomerwa mhosva yekurwisa mwana mudiki akapukunyuka nguva yake mujeri nekubvuma chibvumirano chekuregererwa.Runyerekupe rwakazoti kuregererwa kwepabonde kwakaita kuti mwana mudiki ari mubvunzo ave nepamuviri.Vashandisi vemagariro enhau sengeFacebook (akachengetwa) uye Instagram (akachengetwa) vakaparadzira mug shot yemurume uyu mumapeji ane zvinyorwa zvaiti, semuenzaniso, "murume akapinza mwana, uye mutongi akamurega achifamba".Vamwe vashandisi vakawedzera mhinduro yavo yakadai sekuti "Ndiri kufara asi handishamiswi. claim: Mutambi Helen Hunt akapa mudzidzisi wake wehudiki, "Miss Eleanor", zvipo zvemadhora emadhora emadhora akawanikwa paOscar mushure mekunge mudzidzisi wacho arasikirwa nebasa rake nekupa mamwe mazano ekudzidzisa Hunt kuti amubatsire nekushaya kuverenga kwake.
evidence: Muna March 2026, runyerekupe rwakagoverwa pasocial media rwakaita kuti mutambi Helen Hunt ape $3 mamiriyoni emari yake yaakakunda paOscar Award kumudzidzisi wehudiki uyo akapa rubatsiro rwekudzidzira kuti abatsire Hunt nekushaya simba kwake, kushaya simba kwekudzidza kwemitauro. Runyerekupe rwakapararira paFacebook neYouTube, uye nevaverengi vakawanda veSnopes vakaenda kuti vabvunze kana ichokwadi. Imwe vhidhiyo yeFacebook yakati Hunt akapa "Oscar bonus" yemamiriyoni matatu kumudzidzisi aimbonzi Eleanor, uyo anonzi akadzingwa basa muna 1975 nekupa Hunt "kuwedzera kuraira" kwekushaya simba kwake. Maererano nechikamu, Eleanor akashanda muchitoro kwemakore 23 akatevera chipo chaHunt chekuvhura "nzvimbo yekudzidza yekushaya simba" yakabatsira vana 2,000 vasati vafa muna 2019 . Vamwe vevanotaura kuti vaHunt vakataurawo kuti Eleanor akapa hurukuro yake yeAcademy Award kuti abvume nyaya yake yehudiki. Zvisinei, nhoroondo yaHunt, uyo anonzi akanga aripo, haana kuwana mari yekushaya mari.

claim: Mavhidhiyo evanhu vanoenda pasocial media akaparadzirwa muna 2024 akanyatsorondedzera Paul McCartney achitenga tsamba kubva kumuchato wekutanga waJohn Lennon uye achidzidzosera kumudzimai waLennon nemashoko ekuti arege kutengesa zviyeuchidzo zvake.
evidence: Zvisinei, ... ... McCartney akadzorera tsamba imwe chete yaJohn Lennon, kwete tsamba dzakawanda, uye akaita kudaro kwemakore akati wandei, kwete mazuva akati wandei, tsamba dzakatengeswa. Hapana uchapupu hwekuti McCartney aisanganisira tsamba yaitaura kuna Cynthia Lennon kuti arege kutengesa zviyeuchidzo zvake. Kwemakore, vashandisi veInternet vakagovana nyaya pamusoro pekuita chisimbiso chinorwadza chinotaurwa nemufambi Paul McCartney kuti akambogadzirira mukadzi aimbova mumwe wevaimba yake yeBeatles John Lennon.

claim: Drones uye missile zvinodzingwa nemaune pamusoro penzvimbo dzokugara dzeKyiv kuti vanhu varambe vachitya
evidence: Vhidhiyo iri kuparadzirwa paIndaneti umo murume mumwe chete ari kutaura nezvekurwiswa kwakaitwa Kyiv neRussia usiku hwaJune 17, 2025. Anobvunza kuti nei makombiyuta uye drones zvichipfurwa pamusoro peguta pane kuti zvipfire kana kuti zvitopfurwa pamuganhu neRussia. Maererano naye, hurumende yeUkraine inoziva kubvumira kurwiswa kuti vanhu vatye. Iyi inyanzvi yekuvhiringidza. Kubata Shahedhi uye makombiyuta kuri kuramba kuchiwedzera kuoma nekuda kwekuvandudzwa kwavo kwehunyanzvi, kuchinja kwemaitiro, uye kushomeka kwemidziyo yekudzivirira mhepo. Screenshot yepositi Vhiti iyi yakaburitswa nemushandisi weTikTok mushure mekurwiswa kukuru kweRussia kwaJune 17, 2025. Panguva iyoyo, vanhu 28 vakaurayiwa muKyiv, uye vamwe 134 vakakuvara. Russia yakashandisa 440 strikes uye deco drones, pamwe chete nemhando 32 dzemakombiyuta. Akataura kuti vanhu veUkraine vakashandisa mafirimu akasiyana-siyana pasi pemutemo, uye akataura kuti mafirimu haana kumira kana kuti vanhu veUkraine varipo.

claim: Vadzidzi vemitemo muIndiana vakaedza kugadzira mutemo unobvumira nyika kuti iuraye vanhu kuburikidza nemakamuri egasi uye mapoka ekupfurwa.
evidence: Kana iri mutemo, zvaisava pachena kuti nyika yacho yaizovaka makamuri egasi. Nyika dzinotoshandisa nitrogen gas kuti dziurayiwe dzinoishandisa chifukidziro, kunyange zvazvo Arizona ichinzi yakavandudza kamuri yayo yegasi kuti ishandiswe mune ramangwana. Pakutanga kwa2026, chirevo chakapararira paIndaneti chekuti vemuIndiana vaizoedza kugadzira mutemo waizobvumira kuurayiwa kuburikidza nemakamuri egasi uye mapoka ekuuraya. Mashoko aya akabuda pamapuratifomu akadai seFacebook, X, TikTok uye Instagram. Vadzidzi veSnopes vakanyorawo kuti vabvunze Indiana kuti yakanga ichivaka makamuri egasi. Izvi zvinoda kuti vemuIndiana vanyore. Zvisinei, zviri pachena kuti vemitemo vakatanga kugadzira uye vakatanga kugadzira mutemo waizobvumira vanhu kuti varege kuurayiwa vachishandisa nzira yekupfura gasi uye mapoka ekuuraya.

claim: Italy haina kubvumira maofficial eSSU kuti aende nechikwata cheUkraine kumaOlympic Games  Reuters
evidence: Chinyorwa ichi chinoti Italy haina kubvumira Ukraine kutumira vashandi 120 veSecurity Service of Ukraine kuti vaende nechitima chenyika kuOlympic Games 2026 uye inotiwo Italy Ministry of Sport yakabudisa mhinduro, ichiti chikumbiro chacho hachina kugamuchirika uye ichisimbisa kodzero yevagari veUkraine yekufamba vakasununguka. Zvisinei, izvi ndezvenhema. Reuters haina kuburitsa vhidhiyo yakadaro. Ministry of Sport yeItaly haina kuita zvirevo zvakadaro. Screenshot yepositi yeReuters haina kuburitsa vhidhiyo yakadaro pane yayo yepamutemo webhusaiti, kana pa Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, kana X. Vaparidzi vakaedza kuteedzera maitiro ekutanga emavhidhiyo. Zvisinei, vatungamiriri veReuters havana kushandisa logo yezvigadzirwa, nepo vhidhiyo yekunyepedzera iri.

claim: Zuva rimwe chete asati amiswa, aimbova mutevedzeri wemutungamiri wenyika, Jagdeep Dhankhar, akapindura zvakasimba mutungamiri weCongress, Mallikarjun Kharge, paakataura muRajya Sabha kuti aitya hurumende. Iyi chikamu chekutaura chichabviswa. Nei? Nekuti varimi veIndia nevanakomana vavo havatyi chero ani zvake pasi pemamiriro ezvinhu, Dhankhar anonzi akati.
evidence: Zuva rimwe chete asati abva pabasa rake, aimbova mutevedzeri wemutungamiri wenyika Jagdeep Dhankhar akapindura zvakasimba mashoko emutungamiri weCongress Mallikarjun Kharge ari muRajya Sabha ekuti aitya hurumende. "Chikamu ichi chekutaura chichabviswa. Sei? Nekuti varimi veIndia nevanakomana vavo havatyi chero ani zvake pasi pemamiriro ezvinhu", akadaro Dhankhar. Vhesi yakachengetedzwa yepositi inogona kuonekwa pano. Fact Newschecker yakaona shoko rekuti "Budget Session" uye zuva rekuti "04/04/2025" muvhidhiyo inoenda, izvo zvinopesana nemashoko ekuti chirevo ichi chakaitika zuva rimwe chete Dhankhar asati abva pabasa pazuva rekutanga remusangano wemumhonzo weParamende musi wa21 Chikunguru.

claim: "Kukwereta kwevanhu kunosvika 67% yeGDP kusvika parizvino".
evidence: Munyori uyu akanga akarurama nezvekukura kwechikwereti cheKenya asi akavhiringidza zvimwe zvaanotaura, kusanganisira pakadzokororwa mari payakapfuura 50% yemari yaibva. Panyaya dzedzidzo, akapa mufananidzo wechikamu, achiti chikamu ichi chinogamuchira 27% yemari yose inoshandiswa. Muchokwadi, mufananidzo iwoyo unoshanda chete kune chikamu chemari; mufananidzo uzere uri zvishoma. Kunyange zvazvo akanga akarurama nezvekugadzirwa kwesimba razvino, kutaura kwake kuti Kenya "inoda" magetsi emagetsi emagetsi emamiriyoni 10 000 kunonyadzisa muganho uri pakati pemararamiro enguva refu uye kudiwa chaiko. Zvirongwa zvepamutemo zvakagadza zvinangwa zvakaderera. Pakusaina kwemutungamiri weNyika musi wa9 Kurume 2026, Gurukota rezvemari weKenya John Mbadi akarwira mutemo mutsva wakakwikwidzana wekubhadhara zvivako zvitsva pasina chikwereti chitsva kana mitero. claim: Vabereki vemuFirst lady Melania Trump vakauya kuUnited States kuburikidza nekutsigira kwemhuri, kunonziwo kusarudzika se chain migration.
evidence: Kubva panguva yekutanga yekutonga kwaMutungamiri weUnited States Donald Trump, vazhinji vakafungidzira nezvechimiro chevabereki vekutanga amai Melania Trump uye kuti vakauya sei kuUnited States.Zviitiko zvakawanda zvepamhepo zvakati vakasvika kuburikidza nehurongwa hwaishoropodzwa naTrump pachake uye vakaedza kudzora.Vhidhiyo yeYouTube yaJuly 2025 yakati zvinotevera: Donald Trump akavaka kufamba pamusoro pehasha dzekuenda kune dzimwe nyika  maketani, kudzingwa, uye kurwisa.Asi kumashure kwemasitepisi, akashandisa "kuenda kune dzimwe nyika" kwaakadhimoniza kuti apinde mumhuri yemurume wake apo vana veBrown vakatorwa kubva kuvabereki vavo ndokuvharirwa mumaketani.Panguva yekutonga kwake kwekutanga, Trump akaedza kudzora kutyisidzira kweanonzi "kuenda kune dzimwe nyika", achidana kuti ndeye kuchengetedzeka kwenyika.Uye zvichibva pamapepa emubereki waTrump uye nekusimbiswa kwemutemo kubva kumutemo wake, isu tine nhamba yakafanana yehama dzevabereki vekutanga, uyewo nevatorwa veUS, isu tine nhamba yakaoma yehama dzakatumirwa

claim: China inoronga kurambidza mafoni eSamsung pamusoro peyakavakirwa mukati unremovable Israeli spyware
evidence: Mavhidhiyo evanhu vanotaura kuti "China inoronga kurambidza mafoni eSamsung pamusoro pe 'inobviswa Israeli spyware,'" uye vamwe vanotaura kuti iri kuwedzera kurambidzwa kwakawanda kwemafoni ekunze. Source  Archive Source  Archive Fact Check China yakazivisa kurambidzwa kwenyika yose kweSamsung kana dzimwe nhare dzekunze? China haina kuzivisa kurambidzwa kwenyika yose kweSamsung, Apple, Apple, Google Pixel, kana dzimwe nhare dzekunze kune veruzhinji. Musi wa13 Gunyana 2023, Chinese Ministry of Foreign Affairs yakataura kuti China "haina kuburitsa mitemo, mirau kana magwaro anorambidza kutenga kana kushandisa nhare dzekunze.

claim: Zvinyorwa zvinoratidza vanhu vekuNepal vachifamba vachitsigira Modi
evidence: Kubva kuchamhembe kwakadziva kumabvazuva kweIndia yakashoropodzwa sevatsigiri vaModi muNepal. claim: Chiziviso chakatumirwa nehurumende yeOntario, Canada, chinoratidza kuti Mutungamiri Ronald Reagan haana kururama musi wa25 April 1987, achitaura nezvemitero.
evidence: Mushure mekunge hurumende yeCanada yeOntario yaburitsa chiziviso chinorwisa mitero ichiita kuti mutemo wekutengeserana weUS uonekwe, Mutungamiri Donald Trump akati United States iri kumisa hurukuro dzekutengeserana nemuvakidzani wayo wekuchamhembe.Mune 23 Gumiguru Truth Social post, Trump akataura chirevo cheThe Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation and Institute.Trump akanyora kuti, "The Ronald Reagan Foundation ichangobva kuzivisa kuti Canada yakashandisa kushambadzira, iyo iri FAKE, ine Ronald Reagan achitaura zvisina kunaka nezveMitero".The Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation and Institute isangano risina purofiti rakavakirwa muSimi Valley, California, rakagadzwa naReagan kuti rienderere mberi nhaka yake nemitemo yake.The Reagan Foundation yakati iyo Canadian ad  iyo yakaratidza Reagan's 25 Kubvumbi 1987, radio  yakashandisa "yakasarudzika audio uye vhidhiyo" uye "inopa Presidential Radio Address". Zvisinei, iyo miniti imwe chete yehurukuro yaReagan yaisanganisira zvinyorwa zvekutengesa zvinhu zveJapan.

claim: Panguva yaGov. Hochuls, paive nehuwandu hwematsotsi mumigwagwa yedu.
evidence: Mutungamiri weRepublican anotungamira akati Gov. Kathy Hochul's track record "abysmal" paakaenda kuWestern New York achangobva kushanyirwa neGovernor. "Chinhu chega chinofanira kuratidzwa nevaNew Yorkers kubva pachinzvimbo chake mitengo inokwira, kuwedzera kwekushandisa, kukwira kwemitengo yeMedicaid nekuda kwekubiridzira nekushungurudzwa, uye kuwedzera kwematsotsi mumigwagwa yedu", akadaro Senate Minority Leader Robert Ortt, R-North Tonawanda. Kuwedzera kwematsotsi panguva yedenda kwaive kwanyatsonyorwa, asi takazvibvunza kana kutaura kwaOrtt's kwe"matsotsi emumugwagwa wedu" kubvira Hochul akazova gavhuna musi wa24 Nyamavhuvhu 2021, kuri kwakarurama. Nyika yeNew York inoramba ichitarisa "index crimes" nomwe yehurongwa hwekuzivisa yakagadzirwa neFederal Bureau of Investigation. ina yacho ndeyechisimba: kuuraya, kubata chibharo, kuba uye kuwanda kwemashoko.

claim: Amit Shah akati vezvenhau vanokurudzira kubva kumapato ese vari kurarama ne5kg yavo.
evidence: Chinyorwa cheNTV chinofungidzirwa kuti chiri kukurumidza kupararira pasocial media, zvichida zvichireva kuti chiri kutaura nezvemuranda wezvemukati Amit Shah, chinotaura kuti Shah akati, "Vose vanoshingaira vezvenhau, zvisinei nebato ravanobva, vari kurarama pane yedu 5kg yekudyara!" Mufananidzo uyu uri kugoverwa zvakanyanya pamberi peBihar Assembly Elections 2025, nevashandisi vachitsoropodza chirevo ichi. Screengrab kubva kuX post na @masijeevi Verengawo: This Video Show Driver Cooking Inside Truck Moments Before California Crash? Evidence A keyword search using terms like "Amit Shah", "social media", and "5kg ration" yielded no credible reports or official statements. Verified social media accounts also did not make any such viral remarks. Additionally, the graphic bore the watermark of His show "Powerplay".

claim: Mutungamiri weU.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement uyo akapfura ndokuponda Renee Nicole Good muMinneapolis musi wa7 Ndira 2026, ainzi Steve Grove.
evidence: Musi wa7 Ndira 2026, mumiriri weUnited States Immigration and Customs Enforcement akapfura Renee Nicole Good, 37-gore-rekare, achifa munharaunda yeMinneapolis.Mafoto evapfuuri ekupfurwa uye zviitiko zvakatevera zvakakurumidza kugoverwa pasocial media, zvichikurudzira kutsamwa uye kuongororwa kwechiitiko ichi.Vanhu vazhinji vakaedzawo kuziva (kuchengetedzwa) mumiriri weICE ane mhosva.Zvakawanda zvemagariro evanhu (zvinyorwa) zvemagariro evanhu (zvinyorwa) (zvinyorwa), kusanganisira zvimwe zvakabviswa (zvinyorwa) nekukurumidza uye zvimwe zvaisanganisira mufananidzo unooneka wechiso cheICE mumiriri, zvakaratidza kuti muurayi waGood ainzi Steve Grove (zvinyorwa).Zvimwe zvezvinyorwa izvi zvakarevawo kuti Grove aibva kuMinneapolis.Vatori veRichopes Tribes vakatsvaga webhusaiti yedu vachitsvaga Minnesota. claim: Sangano rinochengetedza risina purofiti reTurning Point USA rakazivisa imwe nzira 2026 Super Bowl hafu-nguva show.
evidence: Nezve izvi, Snopes pakutanga yakaratidza kuti chirevo ichi chakanga chiri chechokwadi, asi kubvira ipapo yakagadziridza chinyorwa ichi kuti chiite sekutaura kwakazoitwa neTurning Point USA kuti yaironga kugadzira yavo 2026 Super Bowl hafu-nguva show.Chinyorwa cheMupepeti: Turning Point USA yakazivisa kuronga kwekupikisa 2026 Super Bowl hafu-nguva show zvichitevera kuburitswa kwekutanga kwemushumo uyu, wakachengetwa pano.

claim: Megan Byron, mudzimai weaimbova CEO weAstronomer Andy Byron, ane nyaya inonzi yakafumurwa nekutsvoda kamera panguva yekonzati yeColdplay muna Chikunguru 2025, akaburitsa chirevo achivimbisa kuti CEO aizonzwa nezvezvaanoita.
evidence: Nezve kuongororwa uku Mukupera kwaJuly 2025, sezvo vashandisi venhau vezvenhau vakaramba vachikurukura nezve nguva yehutachiona iyo aimbova CEO weAstronomer Andy Byron akaonekwa nemaoko ake akatenderedza kambani HR executive Kristin Cabot pa "kiss cam" pamusangano weColdplay, chirevo (chakachengetedzwa) chakaparadzirwa chinofungidzirwa kuti chakanyorwa nemukadzi waByron, Megan Kerrigan Byron.Zvinoenderana nechirevo, chakanzi "Chirevo chepamutemo kubva kuna Megan Byron", Byron akanyora kuti: "Zvakauya kune zvido zvangu  uye sezviri pachena kune zvido zvehafu yeinternet  kuti murume wangu, Andrew Byron, akaita sarudzo dzakati ... dzeruzhinji. Pasi pemwenje.Panguva yeColdplay concert. Nzvimbo ino inowanzoenderana nehukadzi, asi isu tiri. Rega ive yakajeka: Handisi kushandisa magurovhosi aya mukudzivirira, kana kuputsa mwoyo.

claim: "Kuputika mabhomba ezvigadzirwa zvemagetsi zvevagari vemo mhosva yehondo.
evidence: Panguva imwe neimwe yehondo yeIran, Mutungamiri Donald Trump akatyisidzira kurwisa kweUS zvivakwa zvevagari vemo kana hurumende yeIran ikatadza kuzadzisa zvimwe zvinodiwa.Musi wa21 Kurume, Trump akanyora paTruth Social kuti "kana Iran ikasasvinura zvizere, pasina njodzi, iyo Strait yeHormuz, mukati memaawa makumi mana nemasere kubva panguva ino chaiyo, United States of America icharova nekuparadza zvirimwa zvayo zvakasiyana-siyana zvemagetsi, kutanga neYakakura kwazvo!" Kunyangwe Trump akazowedzera nguva iyoyo kaviri, akati musi wa30 Kurume paTruth kuti "kana Strait yeHormuz isiri pakarepo Vhura Bhizinesi, tichapedzisa Zuva Redu Rakanaka muIran nekuputika nekuparadza zvachose zvirimwa zvavo zvese zvemagetsi, Oil & Oil & Oil (mafuta) hub uye Kharg Island, "zvishoma zvekuti kurwisa kwakadai kwakapihwa varwi vedu, asi kwete "zvikonzero zvakawanda", akadaro Trump akati, "zvirongwa zvakadaro hazvina kuitwa, asi zvinangwa zvakadaro hazvina kuitwa".

claim: Nzvimbo dzekuchengetedza data dzakarongwa muNew York State dzaizoshandisa inenge kaviri kushandiswa kwesimba kwemhuri dzese mudunhu rakasanganiswa.
evidence: Sezvo maAmerican mazhinji achiyera mutengo uye mabhenefiti ekuvaka nzvimbo huru dzedata dzekushandisa njere dzekunyepedzera uye mamwe mashoko edhijitari, vaviri veNew York Democrats vakakurudzira nyika kumbomisa mapurojekiti akadaro, vachiti anogona kukuvadza vatengi uye nharaunda.Mune chinyorwa chaMarch 5 muAlbany Times-Union, New York State Sen. Liz Krueger uye Assemblywoman Anna Kelles vakatsigira kumira, vachiti nzvimbo dzedata dzakagadzirirwa mudunhu raida "9,5 gigawatt yemagetsi, iyo inenge yakapetwa kaviri kushandiswa kwesimba kwemhuri dzese mudunhu rakasanganiswa".Vane New York legislators vari kufunga nezvekumisa kuvandudzwa kwenzvimbo itsva dzedata kusvikira paine simba rakakwana rekushandisa zvivakwa zvakagadzirirwa.Mamwe nyika akati wandei akatarisawo zvakadaro, kunyangwe pasina imwe; Gov. Democrat Mills akaisa bhiri rakadaro muMenn.Patakazosvika kuhofisi yaJanet Krueger, mumwe mutauriri akataura nezvechirongwa chakagadziriswa neNew York Independent System, iyo inopa hurukuro yekuparadzira magetsi, uye inoshandisa

claim: Muna March 2026, Mutungamiri weUnited States, Donald Trump akati nezvemuchinda weSaudi Arabia, Mohammed bin Salman, "Haana kufunga kuti aizonditsvoda".
evidence: Vhidhiyo iyi yakaparadzirwa paIndaneti muna March 2026 ichiratidza Mutungamiri weUnited States, Donald Trump, achiti Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman weSaudi Arabia "haafungi kuti aizonditsvoda".Clip iyi yakapararira pamapuratifomu akawanda, uye vashandisi vakawanda mumashoko avo vakaratidza kusava nechokwadi kuti vhidhiyo yacho yaiva yechokwadi, vachiti inogona kunge yakabudiswa vachishandisa njere dzekunyepedzera. Vaverengi vakakumbirawo Snopes kuti aongorore chirevo Chinyorwa chakagoverwa neINDIANS (@India) Chirevo ichi chakanyatsotsanangurwa kuna Trump  akaita chirevo ichi (paawa 43:02) panguva yaakaonekwa pamusangano muMiami weSaudi Investment Initiative isiri purofiti. Imba Yenyika yeWhite yakaburitsa vhidhiyo (yakanyorwa) yehurukuro yake paYouTube musi wa27 Kurume 2026. Takagadzira chirevo chake kuti tione mamiriro ezvinhu akapoteredza ramangwana.
